ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Cicogna, Delle inscrizioni veneziane, p. 23, Giovanni Doglioni studied rhetoric in the Vigilanti Academy in Murano in 1676, and was taught by Gianfrancesco Franzini.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
